name: HIPAA Business Associate Agreements
description: Ensures Business Associate Agreements exist for vendors with PHI access (HIPAA 164.308(b)(1))
query: SELECT id, name, phi_access, baa_signed, baa_expiry FROM vendors WHERE phi_access = true AND (baa_signed = false OR baa_expiry < NOW())
remediation: Execute Business Associate Agreements with all vendors that access, store, or transmit PHI.
